arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss restores big players and hands surprise debut - but still notable absences against Millwall
arts.sum: John Mousinho has reverted to his strongest available Pompey side for tonight’s Millwall clash - but there are still some noticeable absences.

arts.ttl: New Portsmouth signing reveals reasons behind £1.2m transfer as he prepares for potential debut v Millwall
arts.sum: Hayden Matthews has confessed a move to Pompey was too good an opportunity to turn down.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Millwall: build-up, team news and updates from Fratton Park
arts.sum: Welcome to Fratton Park for tonight’s rearranged clash with Millwall.

arts.ttl: Defender seals Derby move after Portsmouth links are rubbished | Former Fratton favourite joins relegation rival on loan
arts.sum: Matt Clarke has rejoined Pompey’s relegation rivals Derby County.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth predicted XI & bench v Millwall: 5 changes made but debut on hold as West Brom decision piles pressure on Blues
arts.sum: The pressure is on Pompey as they welcome Millwall to Fratton Park in the Championship tonight.

arts.ttl: 'Incredibly proud' - Sydney FC boss sends classy parting message to £1.2m Portsmouth new boy
arts.sum: Sydney FC head coach Ufuk Talay has given Hayden Matthews his blessing after he sealed his move to Pompey.

arts.ttl: 'Slightly heavy': Portsmouth ramping up Fratton Park squad exits as transfer window ticks down
arts.sum: Pompey are ready to ramp up Fratton Park departures as a consequence of Hayden Matthews’ recruitment.

arts.ttl: Alex Neil building confidence of Millwall players - wants them to kick on after Championship win
arts.sum: Alex Neil says his Millwall side need to back up their performance and result at Luton when they face Portsmouth at Fratton Park tonight. “What happens is when you inherit a squad that’s not been winning a lot of games they are low on confidence.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss makes 'gamble' admission after £1.2m transfer of 'impressive' Australian international
arts.sum: John Mousinho concedes Hayden Matthews represents a £1.2m ‘gamble’ for Pompey.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth v Millwall injury and team news as 11 out and 2 doubts
arts.sum: Pompey and Millwall meet in the EFL Championship at Fratton Park on Tuesday night.
